column1: # SQL adapter tag map — merged with sys_parameters.json by csvparser.py
#   device     = device identifier (becomes payload "device" and the Kafka topic)
#   server/port/database = MUST match a polling[] entry's protocol.{server
#   tag        = output tag name; the special tag "ts" marks the timestamp column
#                used for incremental reads (exactly one "ts" row per device+table)
#   datatype   = int | float | str | datetime | bool   (blank = accept as-is)
